'''Filian''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[X'Ting]] who was the partner of [[G'Mai Duris]] and Regent on the council that was formed by the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics]] before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He fought in a duel with [[Caiza Quill]], but Caiza killed him; after which Duris was forced to replace him.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[The Hive]]'' {{1stm}}
